category_sources: source_facts.description says it detects vulnerabilities, compliance issues, and misconfigurations; official docs describe KICS as finding security vulnerabilities, compliance issues, and infrastructure misconfigurations in IaC.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kics; official docs brand the project as KICS and explain that it stands for Keeping Infrastructure as Code Secure.
docs_sources: Official KICS documentation is hosted at docs.kics.io and is linked from the project ecosystem as the dedicated docs site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/Checkmarx/kics; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official KICS docs identify vulnerability, compliance, and IaC misconfiguration scanning.
